svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Integration Workflow" id="tgICLaRrlNT6UpUYF3Dp"> <mxGraphModel dx="1183" dy="550" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-47" parent="1" style="rounded=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontColor=#FFFFFF;labelBackgroundColor=none;fontSize=13;" value="Portal
Registration" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="20" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-48" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;" value="ft.Middleware
Integration" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="200" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-49" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;" value="Business Case
Analysis" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="380" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-50" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;" value="POS Dealer
Onboarding" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="560" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-51" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;" value="Pilot
Installation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="740" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-52" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=13;" value="Handover
for Rollout" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="920" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-53" edge="1" parent="1" source="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-47" style="endArrow=block;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontSize=13;" target="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-48"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-54" edge="1" parent="1" source="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-48" style="endArrow=block;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontSize=13;" target="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-49"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-55" edge="1" parent="1" source="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-49" style="endArrow=block;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontSize=13;" target="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-50"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-56" edge="1" parent="1" source="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-50" style="endArrow=block;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontSize=13;" target="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-51"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-57" edge="1" parent="1" source="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-51" style="endArrow=block;fillColor=#1ba1e2;strokeColor=#00A7CE;fontSize=13;" target="LToGybbARtBl7dsATkJE-52"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
